text:

> --- py-dateutil.patch begins here ---

> +++ Makefile	(working copy)
> @@ -3424,6 +3424,7 @@
>       SUBDIR += py-dal
>       SUBDIR += py-darcsver
>       SUBDIR += py-dateutil
> +    SUBDIR += py-dateutil2
>       SUBDIR += py-dbus
>       SUBDIR += py-decorator
>       SUBDIR += py-decoratortools

Wrong patch, I believe :)

Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
